title: cenchrus complanatus
intro: Cenchrus complanatus, also known as the pearl millet or kambli, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Cenchrus complanatus include its ability to reduce cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and provide relief from respiratory issues, among others. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, powder, or oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
